title: Wills Blow Guns
description: This Mod adds a Blowgun with a 3D model (crafted from bamboo), 7 types of darts (in the current version), Normal, TNT, Magma, Noxen, Poison, Withering, and Levitation. It also adds a new plant called the Noxen, and a mod called the Mobble.
body:
This Mod adds a Blowgun with a 3D model (crafted from bamboo), 7 types of darts (in the current version), Normal, TNT, Magma, Noxen, Poison, Withering, and Levitation. Next, it adds the Noxen Plant, including: Noxen, Noxen Seeds, Noxen Buds(edible instantly but weak), Noxen Poison, And Noxen Poison Items. It also adds the Mobble, a hodded mob that is tamable and uses blow darts.

The Mod is designed to add weak items that are made up for due to their quick speeds.
